chapter_title.en: The Dislike of Sleeping After the Fajr Prayer

text: 1450 - وَقَالَ اَلرِّضَا عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: فِي قَوْلِ اَللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ: «فَالْمُقَسِّمٰاتِ أَمْراً» قَالَ «اَلْمَلاَئِكَةُ تُقَسِّمُ أَرْزَاقَ بَنِي آدَمَ مَا بَيْنَ طُلُوعِ اَلْفَجْرِ إِلَى طُلُوعِ اَلشَّمْسِ فَمَنْ يَنَامُ فِيمَا بَيْنَهُمَا يَنَامُ عَنْ رِزْقِهِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1450 - Imam al-Ridha (as) said regarding the verse of Allah (swt), the Exalted: "By those who distribute commands"
He (Imam (as)) explained: "The angels distribute the sustenance of the children of Adam from the time of dawn until sunrise. Therefore, whoever sleeps during this period sleeps away their sustenance."
